detail: Add --handoff mode: renders windowed entries as a resume-context brief (open threads, recent decisions, pending PRs, last ship) instead of the aggregate digest; reuses the existing --summarize Engine seam unchanged

Handoff reuses the digest's Engine seam rather than adding a second one — it's a new deterministic renderer over the same windowed entries, not a new judgment step, so the tool's single-Engine-call invariant holds

Wire --engine {noop,claude-cli} into the post command: --summarize now has a real backend option (ClaudeCLIEngine) alongside the existing NoopEngine default. Verified end-to-end with a live claude CLI call -- real prose landed under ## Summary, the fleet's first genuine judgment step

Default --engine stays noop, not claude-cli: --summarize already opted a run into spending on prose, but the backend choice should be a second, explicit opt-in so a plain --summarize run stays free/deterministic unless the caller asks for the real thing
